headline: Wix and Elavon Launch Unified Commerce Solutions to Help Small Businesses Start, Grow and Scale
summary: Wix and Elavon Launch Unified Commerce Solutions to Help Small Businesses Start, Grow and Scale Wix and Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank and one of the world’s largest payment processors with nearly nine billion transactions annually, today announced a partnership. New York – Wix (Nasdaq: WIX) and Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank (NYSE: USB) and one of the world’s largest payment processors with nearly nine billion transactions annually, today announced a partnership.
